title: Maya's diagnosis of Yahir's father — too much liberty too young
html:
TL;DR

  • Late-night Halloween 2019 capture: Yahir asks maya where his father "went wrong" and she answers "he had so much liberty from a young age" — the answer hits hard enough to require typing "Fuck me…" into the note.
  • Maya contrasts: "She was dominated her whole life" vs. Yahir's mother who "was always a single respected unit because of my dad — that is where they went wrong, according to maya" — the diagnosis names imbalance of dominion as the family wound.
  • This is the earliest extant articulation in the corpus of Yahir actively interviewing an outside adult about his father's psychology — same investigative-prep template later used in 2019 12 12 talk to brenda (Raissa questions) and 2024 04 09 jensen questions.
  • The note was created and modified within a 75-second window — captured raw, not refined. Closer to a transcript than a thought.
  • "Before I forget" as the opening clause is the Apple-Notes-as-instant-capture mode at its purest — the same tic that produced hundreds of times.

Key quotes

"Before I forget: I ask maya where my father went wrong, she responded with the fact that he had so much liberty from a young age. Fuck me..."

"My mom was always a single respected unit because of my dad, that is where they went wrong"

Why it matters in the graph

  • This sits squarely inside the lineage as fate thread — Yahir interrogating what went wrong at the parental level so he can avoid replicating it. The "too much liberty too young" diagnosis is a thesis he could turn on himself: at 17 in Grants Pass with scholarship money on the way and parents who deferred to him, he was also about to have liberty from a young age.
  • The maya entity — until now mostly a "call maya" action item across summer-2025 — gets its first real characterization here: she is the family-psychology informant, the trusted-adult-outside-the-house Yahir consults about the things he can't ask his parents directly.
  • Pairs with 2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it (same week) where Yahir is contemplating moving out of the house — Maya conversation likely fuels that contemplation.
  • Cross with the Christmas Eve 2022 episode where the father conflict explodes — and with dad wisdom which holds the positive counter-thesis. Yahir refuses to flatten the father in either direction; this note is one of the few that names the structural shape of the wound.

Open questions

  • Who is maya exactly? Family friend? Therapist? Aunt? The ease of access plus willingness to give a hard psychological read suggests close-but-not-immediate-family.
  • "She was dominated her whole life" — Maya describing herself, or describing Yahir's mother Iracema? Ambiguous referent.
  • Does this diagnosis ever get written up more fully, or does it stay as this 75-second capture forever?

Wikilinks

maya · yahir family · iracema vargas · lineage as fate · dad wisdom
